1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality boundary by kommunenummer to avoid name mismatch

2.description: Fetch all parcels in Drammen municipality (kommunenummer = '3301') larger than 5000 m² using spatial intersection with municipality boundary

3.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones in Drammen municipality using spatial intersection with municipality boundary

5.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard zones in Drammen municipality using spatial intersection with municipality boundary

6.description: Calculate distance from each parcel to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: Sort parcels by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending
